tests.name: spawned tree line stays visible, registered, and path-blocking
assertions: default map has more than 50 tree entries
sample tree has visible mesh children
sample tree tile is registered in TreeManager
sample tree tile is blocked by PathingGrid
nearest tree query resolves the sample tree

tests.name: lumber depletion removes a tree and releases its pathing blocker
assertions: an open tile becomes blocked after registering a tree
worker gathers 10 lumber from a 10-lumber tree
depleted tree is removed from TreeManager
depleted tree tile is no longer a tree tile
depleted tile is no longer blocked

remaining_before_tree_art_import: Prepare a single-tree or small-cluster GLB candidate instead of using Resource_Tree_Group directly.
Re-run lumber gate, worker readability proof, fallback proof, and default camera readability proof.
Decide whether non-harvestable tree-line clusters are needed as decoration.
